#  Add General Info to a Specification 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click the desired specification area you want to view the info for.   
OR  
Click **Info**![Icon Info3](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8daa3c2524fc6852f143ae85122ba667/6cc6417d2c59aeda0bd76d801eb8e870/icon-info3.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon next to a specification.
  3. Click **General** tab.   
This displays the **General Information** and **Specifications Revisions.**


##### **General Information**
  1. This section displays the following:
    1. Number
    2. Description
    3. Division
    4. Obsolete
  2. Click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=16)icon to:
    1. Email
    2. Move Revision to Recycle Bin
  3. Click **Edit** to update the present information.
  4. Click **Save Changes**.


##### **Specifications Revisions**
  1. This section displays the list of revisions.  
_Note_ : If the ![Icon Info3](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8daa3c2524fc6852f143ae85122ba667/6cc6417d2c59aeda0bd76d801eb8e870/icon-info3.png?fm=webp&h=16)icon is black, you can view the revision. If the icon is greyed out, you are currently viewing the revision.
  2. Click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=16)icon to:
    1. Email
    2. Move Revision to Recycle Bin
  3. Click **Edit** to update the present information.
  4. Click **Save Changes**.


## See Also
  * [View Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-specifications)
  * [Insights Pilot Questions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-insights-pilot-questions)
